ogTitle: Condamine Farms vs Condamine Plains: Climate Safety

heading: Condamine Farms vs Condamine Plains — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Condamine Farms, Queensland and Condamine Plains, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Condamine Plains has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Condamine Farms (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Condamine Farms or Condamine Plains safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Condamine Farms has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Condamine Plains scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Condamine Farms scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Condamine Plains scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Condamine Farms or Condamine Plains?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Condamine Plains has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
